'''fahata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ookinete|ookinete]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ookinete|ookinete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fahata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæhætæth|fæhætæth]] || [[word:fæhætæj|fæhætæj]] || [[word:fæhætæsh|fæhætæsh]] || [[word:fæhætæ|fæhætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fahahatath|fahahatath]] || [[word:fahahataj|fahahataj]] || [[word:fahahatash|fahahatash]] || [[word:fahahata|fahahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fahatath|fahatath]] || [[word:fahataj|fahataj]] || [[word:fahatash|fahatash]] || [[word:fahata|fahata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fahaftath|fahaftath]] || [[word:fahaftaj|fahaftaj]] || [[word:fahaftash|fahaftash]] || [[word:fahaftaf|fahaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fahatatha|fahatatha]] || [[word:fahataja|fahataja]] || [[word:fahatasha|fahatasha]] || [[word:fahataka|fahataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fahatath|fahatath]] || [[word:fahataj|fahataj]] || [[word:fahatash|fahatash]] || [[word:fahata|fahata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fahatathal|fahatathal]] || [[word:fahatajal|fahatajal]] || [[word:fahatashal|fahatashal]] || [[word:fahatakal|fahatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fahatathatha|fahatathatha]] || [[word:fahatajaja|fahatajaja]] || [[word:fahatashasha|fahatashasha]] || [[word:fahataka|fahataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fahatathan|fahatathan]] || [[word:fahatajan|fahatajan]] || [[word:fahatashan|fahatashan]] || [[word:fahatakan|fahatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fahatathaoro|fahatathaoro]] || [[word:fahatajaoro|fahatajaoro]] || [[word:fahatashaoro|fahatashaoro]] || [[word:fahatakaoro|fahatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
